full_quote:
Kyle provided a pair of engaging presentations that helped our design and strategy team understand how new paradigms in web3 may reshape user experiences (and the industry that creates them). What sets Kyle apart is his ability to break down complex concepts in understandable explanations and identify pragmatic strategic implications. In our case, that means helping us understand not only how user experiences will evolve in web3, but also how a UX strategy and design consultancy like ours would sell work in new types of business environments. Kyle provides us with a valuable perspective for thinking about the future of the UX industry, and we look forward to continue working with him.

I've engaged Kyle as a consultant at Guidea Design to support our clients in the early stages of product ideation and definition. His skills as a researcher, strategist, and designer and his high level of client-facing professionalism make it easy for us to call on him when we need more support in these areas.

I would absolutely work with him again and look forward to learning more from him in the future.
